summary: Bin an image/field's samples into per-channel equal-width bins over an explicit value domain. The domain and bin count are required, so the bin assignment is fully explicit; out-of-domain and non-finite samples are tallied separately.

inputs.name: resource
inputs.doc: The image/field whose samples are binned.

outputs.name: report
outputs.doc: The histogram report: per-channel bin counts plus below/above/non-finite tallies.

params.name: bins
params.doc: The number of equal-width bins per channel (1..=2^20).

params.name: domain_min
params.doc: The inclusive lower edge of the value domain.

params.name: domain_max
params.doc: The inclusive upper edge of the value domain (> domain_min).
